dealSummary: Lila Sciences, a startup developing AI for scientific research, is in talks to raise a $2 billion Series B from investors including Calpers and NVentures, Bloomberg reported.
Munich-based industrial robotics startup Agile Robots is in talks to raise about $800 million in new funding from investors including SoftBank, Bloomberg reported.
NewLimit, a startup developing medicines to treat aging, raised a $435 million Series C led by Founders Fund.
Suno, the developer of an AI music generator, secured a $400 million round led by Bond Capital at a $5.4 billion valuation.
Market research platform developer AlphaSense raised a $350 million round from investors including Vitruvian Partners, Accenture Ventures and JPMorgan Asset Management at a $7.5 billion valuation.
leadInvestors: Vitruvian Partners, Accenture Ventures, JPMorgan Asset Management

dealSummary: Cyera, a data security startup, received a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners at a $12 billion valuation, Calcalist reported.
AI observability company Coralogix secured a $200 million Series F led by Advent International and CPP Investments.
Bulgarian space infrastructure specialist EnduroSat is in talks to secure a $200 million Series C, Sifted reported.
Barcelona-based HR tech startup Factorial raised a $150 million Series D led by General Catalyst at a $2.5 billion valuation.
Town, which develops personalized AI assistants, raised a $55 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz, Fortune reported.

company: Forage, whose platform helps low-income families manage their EBT balances
dealSummary: Forage, whose platform helps low-income families manage their EBT balances, raised a $40 million Series B led by Mouro Capital.
